name: Workplace Conflict Case
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If my ideas are not accepted, it means I am not valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never be appreciated at work.
coping_strategies: Avoids sharing ideas to prevent rejection.
situation: A workplace discussion about culture and atmosphere conflicted with a client meeting scheduled by the mentor.
auto_thought: My input is not valued, and I am not important.
behavior: Withdraws from discussions and avoids contributing ideas.
